understanding.goal_understanding: The objective was to complete each level by moving the selectable pieces so that every goal tile marked with a '+' is occupied by a selectable piece at the same time, progressing through all levels until the game reports WIN.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn controls the currently selected piece (identified by player.id and player.position). MOVE_* attempts to shift that piece by one grid cell (3-pixel step) in the chosen direction; movement can be blocked by walls/boundaries or other objects, and some adjacent objects (blocks) may be pushable so they slide along if space allows. Levels can include multiple selectables; using CLICK with an exact object position switches which selectable is controlled. The movement.*_blocked flags are only hints about adjacency and don’t guarantee failure or success, so testing moves is sometimes necessary.
